summary: Read-only plan for cluster gitcrawl-110-plan-ramp. #91134 remains the best live canonical PR for the bundled channel config metadata CI guard. The cluster also contains unrelated Telegram account-agentId and Paperclip gateway compatibility work; those should not be forced into the #91134 duplicate family. #74635 is already closed, so no close action is valid. The linked security-sensitive #63924 is quarantined with route_security only.
